task_completion.description: Verify that a Corridor Scan mission has been added to the mission plan in QGroundControl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl interface is open with a 'Corridor Scan' item visible in the mission item list on the right side of the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the camera is configured as FLIR Vue Pro R 640 or with matching custom specifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Corridor Scan settings panel, the camera dropdown shows 'FLIR Vue Pro R 640', or a custom camera is configured with Sensor Width: 10.88mm, Focal Length: 13mm, and Image Width: 640px.

task_completion.description: Verify the flight altitude is set to 61.2 meters to achieve the target 8 cm/pixel GSD.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The altitude setting in the Corridor Scan panel is set to 61.2 m (or the GSD is explicitly set to 8 cm/px).

task_completion.description: Verify the corridor width is set to 80 meters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Width' or 'Corridor Width' setting in the Corridor Scan panel is set to 80 m.

task_completion.description: Verify the frontal overlap is 70% and side overlap is 60%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Corridor Scan settings, 'Frontal Overlap' is set to 70% and 'Side Overlap' is set to 60%.

task_completion.description: Verify the mission plan is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or QGC file manager window showing the file being saved as 'canal_inspection.plan' in the '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' directory, or a terminal window verifying the file's existence at that path.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the QGroundControl GUI to create the mission.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the QGroundControl application open and being actively interacted with to configure the mission parameters.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the application's save functionality rather than manually writing the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl 'File' -> 'Save' or 'Sync' -> 'Save to File' dialog should be visible in the history, rather than terminal commands like 'echo' or 'cat' being used to write the .plan JSON file directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent didn't run a pre-written script to generate the plan file automatically.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show the execution of python or bash scripts that directly output the 'canal_inspection.plan' file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target altitude to achieve an 8 cm/pixel GSD with the FLIR Vue Pro R 640 camera is exactly 61.2 meters. The camera specs are: sensor width 10.88 mm, focal length 13 mm, image width 640 px. The corridor width must be 80 meters, frontal overlap 70%, and side overlap 60%. The final plan must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/canal_inspection.plan.
